docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GUTIERREZ MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL SANCTUARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL SANCTUARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL SANCTUARY $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $421.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL SANCTUARY $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $271.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23168 ON 6-9-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED TO SENDER.
